title: Google Play Store Listing Confirmed
html:
Google Play Store Listing Confirmed

Today marks a monumental moment in DeHub's history. After years of persistence and determination, we are thrilled to announce that DeHub is officially back on the Google Play Store. For those who have been with us from the beginning, you know this hasn't been an easy journey. Crypto and decentralized applications have faced significant hurdles when it comes to app store listings, with regulatory uncertainty and restrictive policies making it incredibly difficult for projects like ours to maintain a presence on mainstream platforms. This year, however, brought welcome changes to those policies, and we seized the opportunity to push forward with renewed vigour.

Apple App Store on the Horizon

While we celebrate this Google Play milestone, we want to keep our community informed about our progress on the Apple front. Our developer account has been confirmed, and we're currently in the process of converting to a business account. This ensures that when DeHub appears on the App Store, it will be listed under our company name—exactly as it should be for a project of this scale. We don't anticipate any issues with the approval process, but rest assured, if any arise, we'll address them swiftly. The Apple App Store listing is on track, and we're confident it won't be far behind.

What Comes Next: A Serious Marketing Push

With app store presence secured, we're now gearing up for what will be one of the largest marketing campaigns in DeHub's history. Our co-founders, Mike and Indy, have already announced a strategic partnership with one of the biggest TikTok agencies in the world—a powerhouse with access to over 1,200 streamers. This isn't just any partnership; we're talking about an agency that reports directly to TikTok executives, hosts talks for major stakeholders, and runs events at TikTok headquarters. This is serious business, and it signals exactly where DeHub is headed. We're not here to play small—we're here to revolutionize decentralized media, and we have the partnerships and infrastructure to make it happen.

---

Download DeHub on Google Play Store
md:
# Google Play Store Listing Confirmed

Today marks a monumental moment in DeHub's history. After years of persistence and determination, we are thrilled to announce that DeHub is officially back on the Google Play Store. For those who have been with us from the beginning, you know this hasn't been an easy journey. Crypto and decentralized applications have faced significant hurdles when it comes to app store listings, with regulatory uncertainty and restrictive policies making it incredibly difficult for projects like ours to maintain a presence on mainstream platforms. This year, however, brought welcome changes to those policies, and we seized the opportunity to push forward with renewed vigour.

## Apple App Store on the Horizon

While we celebrate this Google Play milestone, we want to keep our community informed about our progress on the Apple front. Our developer account has been confirmed, and we're currently in the process of converting to a business account. This ensures that when DeHub appears on the App Store, it will be listed under our company name—exactly as it should be for a project of this scale. We don't anticipate any issues with the approval process, but rest assured, if any arise, we'll address them swiftly. The Apple App Store listing is on track, and we're confident it won't be far behind.

## What Comes Next: A Serious Marketing Push

With app store presence secured, we're now gearing up for what will be one of the largest marketing campaigns in DeHub's history. Our co-founders, Mike and Indy, have already announced a strategic partnership with one of the biggest TikTok agencies in the world—a powerhouse with access to over 1,200 streamers. This isn't just any partnership; we're talking about an agency that reports directly to TikTok executives, hosts talks for major stakeholders, and runs events at TikTok headquarters. This is serious business, and it signals exactly where DeHub is headed. We're not here to play small—we're here to revolutionize decentralized media, and we have the partnerships and infrastructure to make it happen.

---

**[Download DeHub on Google Play Store](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=io.dehub.mobile&hl)**
